ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pitch of the product */,
  "dha_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the D-H-A value of the product */,
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the length of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "coating" TEXT /* Coating of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., each, pack) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "technical_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed technical specifications */,
  "usage_guidelines" TEXT /* Usage guidelines for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary supplier of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_dha_id FOREIGN KEY ("dha_id") REFERENCES dhas ("dha_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_length_id FOREIGN KEY ("length_id") REFERENCES lengths ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitches" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch */,
  "pitch_value" REAL /* Value of the pitch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dhas" (
  "dha_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each D-H-A value */,
  "dha_value" TEXT /* Value of the D-H-A */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the D-H-A */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dha_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length */,
  "length_value" INTEGER /* Value of the length */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the length */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Quality rating of the supplier's products */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for deliveries (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the product (in days) */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the product */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "preferred_supplier" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the preferred supplier for the product */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed with this supplier */,
  "next_order_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the product */,
  "maximum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level for the product */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "next_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inventory check */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the warehouse */,
  "storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Current storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "temperature_control" INTEGER /* Indicates if the warehouse has temperature control */,
  "humidity_control" INTEGER /* Indicates if the warehouse has humidity control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, inventory manager, production supervisor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the inventory record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier for the order */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number for the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coating_types" (
  "coating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coating type */,
  "coating_name" TEXT /* Name of the coating type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coating type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coating_id")
)
